cannot_solve_problem: AirPods Pro 3: chirping_feedback 8% — core transparency/ANC mode unusable for affected users; Apple support cannot resolve
AirPods 4: falls_out_of_ears 22% — fit failure prevents basic use during activity
creates_new_problem: AirPods Pro 3: apple_only_compatibility 8% — live translation locked to iPhone 15+, not disclosed
AirPods 4: authenticity_doubts 7% — potential counterfeit risk via Amazon
unrelated_to_product: AirPods Pro 3: poor_condition_received 5% — Amazon fulfillment quality

comparison_verdict.airpods_pro3_vs_airpods4: Pro 3 superior on ANC and battery, but 8% chirping feedback is a serious unresolved hardware issue unique to Pro 3. AirPods 4 has worse fit (22%) but no equivalent safety/comfort bug.
comparison_verdict.overall: Both products remain competitive in class. Pro 3 is the premium pick if chirping is absent; AirPods 4 is lower-risk for those prioritising reliability.

report_recommendation: Update existing wireless-earbuds comparison report (02-17). Add chirping_feedback as a NEW critical issue for Pro 3 that was not present in Feb data. Flag that 8% of users cannot use transparency mode reliably.
conclusion: AirPods Pro 3 今日新增數據確認 chirping feedback 8% 是持續性問題（Apple support 無法解決），應在現有報告中新增此缺陷警示。整體類別結論不變：Pro 3 降噪更強，但此新發現降低了其優先推薦強度。
